news.headline: A&D Mortgage introduces first integrated Non-QM AUS, pioneering innovation in mortgage industry.
news.summary: In Fort Lauderdale, Florida, A&D Mortgage, the top Non-QM lender in the nation, has introduced a new automated decision system for Non-QM loan products.

news.headline: Carbon Arc secures $56M funding for world's first consumption-based insights exchange, fueling expansion with top investors.
news.summary: A technology company from New York, Carbon Arc, has secured $56 million in venture capital funding to introduce the globe's initial real-time insights exchange. This platform will offer businesses and the artificial intelligence sector with readily available intelligence and well-organized, model-prepared data. The primary investor is Liberty City Ventures, a company that has nurtured Carbon Arc from its inception. Other contributors include K5 Global, Raptor Group, and Wasserman Media Group. The substantial investment will enable Carbon Arc to expand its data utility services.

news.headline: QIMA partners with TA Associates, a private equity firm, for growth in the testing, inspection, and certification industry.
news.summary: A notable investment has been made in QIMA as TA Associates, a prominent global private equity firm, has decided to invest in the company. This investment signifies a significant milestone for QIMA, as it will provide them with the necessary resources and support to further expand their operations. The exact amount of the investment has not been disclosed, but it is expected to be a substantial sum that will aid in QIMA's growth and development in the foreseeable future.

news.headline: Downy teams up with Operation Warm, donating $100,000 to provide winter coats and shoes to children in need.
news.summary: CINCINNATI-- Downy liquid fabric softener is teaming up with Dollar General this March and April to support Operation Warm, a nonprofit providing winter coats and shoes to children in need. Downy's partnership includes a $100,000 donation to Operation Warm. Customers purchasing Downy at Dollar General during this period will be supporting the cause. The collaboration will also feature in-person events and in-store programs aimed at assisting children across the country.

news.headline: Casey's partners with "Weather Women: Into the Bear's Cage" documentary as storm chasing season begins. Casey's is the third largest convenience retailer and fifth largest pizza chain in the U.S.
news.summary: An Iowa-based company, Casey’s, known as the third-largest convenience retailer and fifth-largest pizza chain in the United States, is collaborating with "Weather Women: Into the Bear’s Cage," a cinematic storm chasing documentary by Paradeigm Films, as the first day of spring and storm chasing season approaches. The documentary features daring female storm chasers. Casey’s spokesperson highlighted the importance of seizing opportunities and chasing dreams. The company aims to support such adventures.

news.headline: Xenoblade Chronicles X: Definitive Edition launches on Nintendo Switch, set in 2054 after Earth's destruction in intergalactic war.
news.summary: This week’s Nintendo Download features Xenoblade Chronicles X: Definitive Edition for the Nintendo Switch. Set in 2054 after Earth's destruction in an intergalactic war, players must assist a small group of survivors on the planet Mira to save humanity from extinction. The game offers a massive sci-fi adventure with recruiting party members and engaging gameplay. The year 2054 serves as the backdrop for this tale of survival, where players navigate a post-apocalyptic world. Enjoy the immersive experience of aiding humanity's resurgence in this critically acclaimed game now available on the Nintendo eShop.

news.headline: Anuncia Medical gets FDA Breakthrough Device Designation for ReFlow® EVD, expanding critical care solutions. Initiatives against Hydrocephalus supported.
news.summary: A company has recently broadened its portfolio of cerebrospinal fluid (CSF) management and critical care solutions and was granted funding by the Flinn Foundation. The company, based in Scottsdale, Arizona, disclosed this information on March 20, 2025. The expansion is aimed at supporting initiatives worldwide and locally to lessen the effects of hydrocephalus.

news.headline: CompWest Insurance Company names HUB International Agency of the Year for strong premium performance and new business growth.
news.summary: In Lansing, Michigan, on March 20, 2025, CompWest Insurance Company recognized Hub International Limited (HUB) as the Agency of the Year. This prestigious award was granted for HUB's exceptional achievements in premium performance, new business growth, and client retention. Hub International Limited, a prominent global insurance brokerage and financial services firm, was chosen for its outstanding performance in these key areas.

news.headline: AbsoluteCare, a healthcare company, expands to serve more members in Ohio, providing whole-person care to vulnerable and ill adults.
news.summary: In Columbia, Maryland, on March 20, 2025, AbsoluteCare®, a healthcare company focused on value-based care, is dedicated to providing holistic care to vulnerable and chronically ill adults through their Beyond Medicine™ approach. They offer a wide range of services to members at community-based care centers and in their homes. In a recent announcement...

news.headline: Dr. John Cottingham, MD, opens MDVIP practice in Webster, Texas, part of network with 1,300+ physicians nationwide.
news.summary: In Webster, Texas, a newly opened medical practice specializing in preventive health and wellness is led by a board-certified family doctor. This facility is affiliated with MDVIP, a renowned provider of membership-based healthcare services. MDVIP boasts a network of more than 1,300 primary care physicians operating across the country. This location commenced operations on March 20, 2025, demonstrating MDVIP's ongoing commitment to enhancing access to high-quality healthcare services for individuals seeking proactive and personalized medical attention.

news.headline: AF Group awards Middle Market Agency of the Year to ProValue in Midwest Region for outstanding performance in 2024.
news.summary: In Lansing, Michigan on March 20, 2025, AF Group announced the winners of the Middle Market Agency of the Year awards for 2024. ProValue in the Midwest Region and another agency in the East Region were recognized for their exceptional performance in premium generation, new business expansion, and customer retention. This prestigious award celebrates their outstanding achievements in these areas.

news.headline: US targets one individual and several entities and vessels in new Iran-related sanctions - US Treasury Website.
Accident Fund names BHS Insurance Agency of the Year for 2024 due to strong performance, growth, retention.
news.summary: In Lansing, Michigan, on March 20, 2025, Accident Fund announced BHS Insurance as the Agency of the Year for 2024 due to their exceptional performance in areas such as strong premium growth, new business expansion, and high retention rates. This recognition highlights the importance of fostering strong relationships within the insurance sector for success.

news.headline: RunMyProcess forms partnership with Koral Value in Colombia to expand BOAT platform in Latin America.
news.summary: In Dallas, a recent partnership between RunMyProcess and Colombian consulting firm Koral Value aims to boost the utilization of RunMyProcess, a Business Operations Automation Technology platform, in Latin America. This collaboration seeks to increase adoption rates in the region and leverage the expertise of Koral Value to effectively introduce the platform.

news.headline: Jabil Inc. (NYSE: JBL) beats Q2 earnings estimates with $1.94 EPS and $6.73B in sales, stock surges on positive outlook.
news.summary: Jabil Inc. (NYSE:JBL) released their second-quarter results, with adjusted earnings per share at $1.94, which surpassed the analyst's expected $1.83. Their quarterly sales amounted to $6.73 billion, higher than the predicted $6.408 billion. Regulated Industries revenue saw an 8% increase year over year, Intelligent Infrastructure revenue grew by 18% year over year, while Connected Living & Digital Commerce revenue decreased by 13% year over year. The company closed the quarter with cash and equivalents totaling $1.592 billion, and an adjusted free cash flow of $261 million. For more details, please refer to the full story on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: MOON Oral Beauty and Sprinkles collaborate on limited-edition toothbrush & toothpaste set to celebrate bakery's 20th anniversary.
news.summary: In an exciting collaboration, MOON Oral Beauty and Sprinkles have joined forces to release a co-branded electric toothbrush and toothpaste duo. This partnership celebrates both companies' milestones, specifically Sprinkles' 20th anniversary and MOON's venture into the beauty industry. The newly launched products in this unique collection are inspired by desserts and aim to offer a sweet twist to everyday oral care routines. This innovative collaboration is set to bring a fresh approach to dental hygiene, blending technology with fun flavors. The products are now available to consumers, offering a delightful experience while promoting dental health.

news.headline: ISN released a report analyzing workplace injuries, finding 19,900 potential SIF cases from 2017-2023. 16% decrease from 2022 to 2023.
news.summary: In Dallas, ISN, a top provider of contractor and supplier information management solutions, has recently published its newest Serious Injury & Fatality (SIF) Insights White Paper. This report delves into data from 2023 along with a comprehensive seven-year study, highlighting the application of ASTM E2920-19's Level One Injury Recording standards. Across recordable incidents spanning from 2017 to 2023, ISN's research pinpointed 19,900 potential SIF instances. The examination demonstrates a 16% reduction in SIF cases from the year 2022 to 2023, marking the lowest figure recorded in the analysis.

news.headline: Webinar by iconectiv discusses how data centers become crucial for CSPs with technologies like 5G.
news.summary: As telecommunications companies (CSPs) increasingly embrace innovative technologies such as 5G and edge computing, the significance of data centers in handling latency, bandwidth, and processing capabilities in proximity to users is becoming paramount. Moving forward, data centers are expected to transform from mere storage facilities into distributed focal points of connectivity. This evolution will enable CSPs to enhance routing efficiencies, tap into ultra-fast edge resources, and introduce novel services to customers.

news.headline: ISG study shows Global Capability Centers elevating AI and data analytics skills; moving from labor arbitrage to high-skilled work.
news.summary: A recent study conducted by ISG Market Lens™ revealed a change in GCC staffing trends. The focus is transitioning from basic labor arbitrage to incorporating a greater emphasis on higher-skilled tasks and specialized knowledge. This shift indicates a move towards more sophisticated work within the GCC sector.

news.headline: Postmedia introduces self-serve advertising platform P.A.M., linking businesses to 130+ news brands to streamline ad buying.
news.summary: Postmedia has unveiled the Postmedia Ad Manager (P.A.M.), a new self-serve advertising platform designed to simplify digital and print advertising for businesses. This platform allows businesses to efficiently manage their advertising campaigns across Canada's leading network of news brands. With access to over 130 digital and print news brands nationwide, advertisers can easily reach Postmedia's extensive audience. Postmedia Ad Manager aims to streamline the ad buying process for businesses of all sizes.

news.headline: Thirlby Clinic in Michigan sees 18% rise in payments after utilizing eClinicalWorks & healow. AI solutions and a medical scribe also implemented.
news.summary: In Westborough, Massachusetts, eClinicalWorks, the leading ambulatory cloud EHR provider, revealed that Thirlby Clinic, an internal and family medicine center located in Traverse City, Michigan, experienced a notable 18% surge in overall patient payments following their adoption of eClinicalWorks and healow Pay™. Additionally, the clinic has integrated eClinicalWorks' AI technologies and employed an AI medical scribe known as Sunoh.ai. Thirlby Clinic is renowned for delivering top-tier, patient-focused internal and family medicine services to individuals residing in and near its area of operation.

news.headline: 2024 charitable giving approached all-time high, Blackbaud Institute data shows. Significant trends unveiled.
news.summary: A report on 2024 giving trends was revealed by the Blackbaud Institute based in Charleston, S.C., on March 20, 2025. This institute is a research lab affiliated with Blackbaud, a key player in social impact software (NASDAQ: BLKB). The insights shared cover the trends observed during the year 2024.

news.headline: Harsh Singla named CTO of the Year at The Innovation Awards 2025 for excellence in technology at Integrity Marketing Group.
news.summary: On March 20, 2025, in Dallas, Harsh Singla was recognized for his dedication to developing top-tier technology that utilizes Integrity's data and analytics to provide remarkable consumer insights. Integrity Marketing Group, LLC, a prominent life and health distributor, praised Singla for his contributions to enhancing their technological capabilities.

news.headline: Millennials & Gen Z favor buying alcohol online, but outdated laws hinder sales, leaving billions unserved. Los Angeles, March 20, 2025.
news.summary: Recent data indicates that a majority of younger consumers show a strong preference for purchasing alcohol through online channels. However, due to antiquated distribution regulations and reluctance from retailers, there is a significant portion of potential sales left unfulfilled. This trend is particularly prevalent among the younger demographic, highlighting the need for adaptation within the industry. In Los Angeles, as of March 20, 2025, DRINKS, a prominent alcohol e-commerce platform, stands out as a key player in catering to this evolving consumer behavior. The current situation underscores the untapped market potential, with billions in revenue waiting to be captured by businesses that embrace the digital retail landscape.

news.headline: Mach Industries forms Mach Propulsion for unmanned defense technology with new jet engine factory.
news.summary: Enhancing national security through cutting-edge propulsion technology, Mach Industries from Huntington Beach, California, revealed on March 20, 2025, the establishment of Mach Propulsion. This new division will specialize in pioneering advancements in defense manufacturing.

news.headline: FNRP launches FNRP University to educate investors on private equity real estate. March 20, 2025. From RED BANK, N.J. Headquartered firm.
news.summary: A prominent private equity commercial real estate firm, First National Realty Partners (FNRP), unveiled a new educational platform on March 20, 2025. This platform aims to equip investors with valuable insights and resources to effectively navigate the realm of private equity real estate. Based in Red Bank, N.J., FNRP's initiative provides individuals with the necessary tools to make informed decisions within this sector.

news.headline: USPS honors Native American culture with Powwow Stamps at Gathering of Nations Pow Wow in Albuquerque, NM.
news.summary: On March 20, 2025, in Washington, the U.S. Postal Service is set to conduct a ceremony to mark the first day of issuance for the Powwows: Celebrating Native American Culture stamps. This event will take place at the annual Gathering of Nations Pow Wow in Albuquerque, NM, where the Forever stamps will be unveiled. The ceremony aims to celebrate and honor Native American culture through these stamps, which will be introduced to the public during this event.

news.headline: Lockdown Experts, LLC partners with Magic EdTech to enhance school safety with latest Lockdown ALM® system. - Date: March 20, 2025- Company: Lockdown Experts, LLC- Partner: Magic EdTech- System: Lockdown ALM®- Focus: School safety and crisis response
news.summary: Lockdown Experts, LLC, based in New York, unveiled their most recent version of the Lockdown ALM® system on March 20, 2025. The system is specifically crafted to aid schools and educational establishments in rapidly reacting to emergencies. The cutting-edge technology is tailored for instant notifications and...

news.headline: Highwire Capital confirms plan to acquire SPAR Group (SGRP) in a middle-market deal. Acquisition to be finalized soon.
news.summary: On March 20, 2025, Highwire Capital, a middle-market investment firm, confirmed plans to finalize the acquisition of SPAR Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: SGRP) in response to queries from the media and investors. The acquisition, known as the Proposed Acquisition, is set to proceed as intended.

news.headline: New SNICKERS Eggs are out for Easter, featuring caramel, peanut, nougat. Released by Mars in Newark.
news.summary: SNICKERS Eggs have made their spring debut, showcasing the beloved combination of caramel, peanut, and nougat in a perfectly egg-shaped form. The delectable treats are now available in NEWARK, N.J., with the exciting release taking place on March 20, 2025. Produced by SNICKERS, a part of the Mars company, these eggs are creating quite a buzz among candy enthusiasts.

news.headline: Stern Recruiting, founded by Rick Stern, aims to transform talent acquisition. Launches in Chicago on March 20, 2025.
news.summary: A new talent acquisition agency, Stern Recruiting, was founded by Rick Stern, a veteran of the telecommunications industry. The agency launched on March 20, 2025, aiming to revolutionize talent acquisition strategies through Stern's extensive experience. With a unique approach, Stern Recruiting aims to improve recruitment practices in the industry and bring new perspectives to the forefront.

news.headline: US Remote Patient Monitoring Market to reach US$29.13 billion by 2030, growing at 12.8% CAGR. Valued at US$14.15 billion in 2024.
news.summary: In Delray Beach, Florida, as of March 20, 2025, the worldwide market for US Remote Patient Monitoring has been valued at US$14.15 billion in 2024. Experts predict an impressive compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 12.8%, with expectations for the market to soar to US$29.13 billion by 2030. This upward trajectory is attributed to the rising population of elderly people and the growing request for remote healthcare services.

news.headline: Sleep expert Dr. Funke Afolabi-Brown relocates The Restful Sleep Place to new office in Horsham, PA from April 1, 2025.
news.summary: Well-known specialist in sleep medicine, Dr. Funke Afolabi-Brown, has disclosed the transfer of The Restful Sleep Place to a new location in Horsham, PA, starting April 1, 2025. This relocation aims to elevate patient care standards and aligns with her goal to enhance sleep wellness for both individuals and families.

news.headline: Atos supports Special Olympics World Winter Games Turin 2025, the biggest humanitarian sports event. #SpecialOlympics #Turin2025
U.S. insurance industry resilient in 2024 despite challenges: Investment gains & better pricing offset impacts of catastrophic events.
news.summary: According to a recent report by Verisk and APCIA, in 2024, investment gains and better aligned pricing helped offset the impacts of severe catastrophic events. The report highlighted that the financial gains from investments, coupled with more accurately priced policies, proved beneficial in mitigating the losses incurred from significant catastrophic events during that year.

news.headline: Comcast expands internet to 6,700 new homes/businesses in Southeast GA, Mt. Vernon, Wrightsville, Soperton, Adrian, Glenwood, and Alamo.
news.summary: In recent news, a network expansion initiative has resulted in the connection of approximately 6,700 new households and businesses in various locations in Southeast, Georgia. The areas benefiting from this development include Mt. Vernon, Wrightsville, Soperton, Adrian, Glenwood, and Alamo. This initiative was led by Comcast, bringing increased access to Xfinity and Comcast Business services to the residents and businesses in these regions. The efforts aim to provide reliable connectivity and enhance the overall service quality for the newly connected properties.

news.headline: C1 named 2024 North America Partner of the Year by Genesys, a global cloud leader in AI.
news.summary: In Bloomington, Minnesota on March 20, 2025, C1, a worldwide technology solution provider specializing in enhancing connected human experiences, revealed that it received the prestigious title of 2024 North America Partner of the Year from Genesys®. Genesys® is a leading global provider of cloud services in AI-Powered Experience Orchestration. This recognition highlights C1's exceptional performance and dedication in the industry.

news.headline: Advantech (TWSE: 2395) and Arbor Day Fdn team up for 2nd year on Earth Day reforestation effort.
news.summary: Advantech, a prominent player in industrial Internet of Things and edge computing solutions, based in Irvine, California, revealed on March 20, 2025, their collaboration extension with the Arbor Day Foundation for the second year in a row. This move underlines their dedication to working together for a sustainable future. Advantech, listed on TWSE (stock symbol: 2395), is recognized globally for its expertise in IoT and edge computing technologies.

news.headline: SYSPRO appoints Josef Al-Sibaie as Chief of Staff and Corporate Development Officer to drive global growth and expansion.
news.summary: In Tustin, California, on March 20, 2025, SYSPRO, a prominent global digital manufacturing solutions provider, revealed the selection of Josef Al-Sibaie as their new Chief of Staff and Corporate Development Officer. This move highlights SYSPRO's dedication to growth and development in the industry.

news.headline: Sensei partners with Zadún, a Ritz-Carlton Reserve in LOS CABOS, Mexico, bringing wellness and spa programming to exclusive destination.
news.summary: An exclusive ultra-luxury destination in Los Cabos, Mexico, known as Zadún, a Ritz-Carlton Reserve, has recently partnered with Sensei to introduce evidence-based wellness and spa programming. This renowned resort in Puerto Los Cabos made the announcement on March 20, 2025. The partnership aims to enhance the guest experience by offering specialized wellness services. Zadún is recognized for its top-notch services and this collaboration is expected to further elevate the standards of luxury hospitality in the region.

news.headline: Butter Wines redesigns packaging with a yellow label for quality promise. Butter Chardonnay is the top seller in premium segment.
news.summary: NAPA, Calif., March 20, 2025 - Butter Wines, known for its award-winning Butter Chardonnay, continues to dominate the premium Chardonnay market with its iconic yellow label. The brand's flagship product, Butter Chardonnay, holds the title of the top-selling single SKU in the premium category. The promise of quality is evident throughout the wine aisle as Butter Wines maintains its position as the industry leader in providing exceptional Chardonnay options.

news.headline: US Leading Economic Index fell by 0.3% in Feb 2025 to 101.1 (2016=100), continuing a downward trend. LEI dropped 1.0% in 6-month period ending Feb 2025.
news.summary: In March 20, 2025, it was reported that the Conference Board Leading Economic Index® (LEI) for the US dropped by 0.3% in February 2025, settling at 101.1 (2016=100). This decrease followed a revised 0.2% decline (initially -0.3%) in January. Over the six months leading up to February 2025, the LEI saw a total decline of 1.0%.

news.headline: Laifen's Wave electric toothbrush earns ADA Seal of Acceptance on World Oral Health Day, March 20, 2025.
news.summary: On World Oral Health Day on March 20, 2025, Laifen, a renowned personal care brand celebrated a milestone with its high-tech toothbrush, the Wave. Laifen, known for its affordable and innovative products, introduced the Wave, a next-generation electric toothbrush. This toothbrush has gained global recognition for its advanced features, making it accessible to a wide audience.

news.headline: CropX introduces Strato 1, an advanced in-field weather station for smarter farming decisions worldwide.
news.summary: On March 20, 2025, CropX Technologies, a prominent player in digital agronomy solutions, introduced Strato 1, a cutting-edge in-field weather station. This device aims to improve on-farm decision-making by providing real-time, hyperlocal weather information globally.

news.headline: Edible Brands launches Edibles.com for same-day delivery of top hemp products, enhancing accessibility in THC market.
news.summary: Edibles.com, a health-focused platform, provides fast same-day delivery of top THC-infused items from notable brands such as Cann, Wana, and 1906, reshaping the market landscape. Established in Atlanta, on March 20, 2025, this platform aims to enhance accessibility to quality products in the THC category.

news.headline: Inventor from Arkansas creates innovative Toilet Spinner system (TLS-652) to draw waste downward and keep bowl clean.
news.summary: A new toilet system called the TOILET SPINNER was created by an inventor from Bentonville, Ark., with the goal of ensuring proper waste disposal and maintaining a clean bowl. Launched on March 20, 2025, this innovative system efficiently moves all liquid and solid waste downward while preventing splatter in the bowl. The inventor highlighted the design's ability to keep the bowl fresh and free from mess. This groundbreaking invention aims to revolutionize the traditional toilet system and enhance the overall bathroom experience.

news.headline: Kroger launches "Elite ATE" snack bracket with Associate's favorite snacks. -CINCINNATI, March 20, 2025. $KR.
news.summary: A popular retailer has recently announced the commencement of its "Elite Ate" Snack Bracket competition, showcasing a variety of customers' favorite snack options. The company behind this competition is The Kroger Co. (NYSE: KR) based in Cincinnati, with the announcement being made on March 20, 2025. This event aims to showcase a range of snack products offered by the company's brands, providing a platform for customers to vote on their top choices. The initiative also revealed the preferred snacks among Kroger associates, adding an interesting twist to the competition.

news.headline: John Silvanus Wilson Jr. named first President of The Citizen Service, a new national public service.
news.summary: In Metuchen, New Jersey, on March 20, 2025, The Citizen Service, a newly established national public service initiative, announced John Silvanus Wilson Jr as its inaugural president. With a background in higher education, Wilson previously led Morehouse College and brings a wealth of leadership experience to this role.

news.headline: Unanet announces 2025 Partner of the Year Awards in Dulles, VA for GovCon and AEC industries.
news.summary: In Dulles, Virginia, on March 20, 2025, Unanet, a top provider of project-based enterprise resource planning (ERP) and customer relationship management (CRM) for the government contracting (GovCon) and architecture, engineering, and construction (AEC) sectors, revealed its latest updates.

news.headline: Secretary of Russia's Security Council Shoigu: Russia will invite the US to international security meeting to be held in Moscow in May - Ria.
